title: I just deleted all my MCPs. Skills + CLI is all you need.
author: Mitko Vasilev
notes: Viral LinkedIn one-liner declaring removal of all MCPs in favor of Skills + CLI. 450+ comments thread includes notable practitioner debate (Bora Celik citing Mario Zechner's MCP-vs-CLI benchmark, Carsten Lindstedt on tool-surface entropy, SMARTHAUS rebuttal on governance, etc.).
